英國英格蘭肯特瓦爾梅
zh.Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fogge於1417年出生在英國肯特阿福德時，他的父親Sir William Fogge28歲，母親Septvans28歲。他於大約1439年與Alice Kurriel在英國英格蘭德比夏爾雷普頓結婚。他於1485年登記服兵役。他去世於1490年在英國肯特享年73歲，埋葬在英國肯特阿福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Fogge于1417年出生在英国肯特阿福德时，他的父亲Sir William Fogge28岁，母亲Septvans28岁。他于大约1439年与Alice Kurriel在英国英格兰德比夏爾雷普頓结婚。他于1485年登记服兵役。他去世于1490年在英国肯特享年73岁，埋葬在英国肯特阿福德。

nameMeanings.name: Fogge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Franz.

English and French: from Middle English and Old French forge ‘forge, smithy’ (from Latin fabrica ‘workshop’, a derivative of faber ‘smith, workman’; compare Lefevre ), in most cases a metonymic occupational name for a smith or someone employed by a smith. It can also be a topographic name for someone who lived near a forge or smithy. Compare French Deforge and Laforge .

variants.name: Lefevre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Andre, Emile, Jacques, Joffre, Luc, Adrien, Antoine, Armand, Camille, Eunide, Francois, Germaine.

French and Walloon (Lefèvre): occupational name for a blacksmith or ironworker, Old French fevre, with fused masculine definite article le. One of the most common surnames in France from an early date, coined before the French word for smith, fèvre (from Latin faber ‘maker’), was replaced by forgeron. This surname was also brought to England (in the 16th century by Protestant Walloons and later reinforced by Huguenots from France). It is also established in the Flemish part of Belgium and in Haiti. See also Lefebvre , compare Faver , Lafaver , Lafever , Lefever , and Leffew .

History: This surname is listed (in the form Le Fèvre) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America (in the form Le Fevre).

variants.name: Forgue
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Armand, Lucien, Wilner, Zoel.
French (southern): variant of   Forge   or   Forgues   and, in North America, also an altered form of the latter. This surname is also found in Haiti, where it is very rare.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Fogge was born in 1417, in Ashford, Kent, England, his father, Sir William Fogge, was 28 and his mother, Septvans, was 28. He married Alice Kurriel about 1439, in Repton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. He registered for military service in 1485. He died in 1490, in Kent, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Ashford, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fogge est né en 1417, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Fogge, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Septvans, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Alice Kurriel environ 1439, à Repton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1485. Il est décédé en 1490, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Fogge 1417 in Ashford, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Fogge 28 und seine Mutter Septvans 28. Er hat um 1439 in Repton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Kurriel geheiratet. Er hat sich 1485 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1490 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Kent, England und wurde in Ashford, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fogge è nato il nel 1417 nel Ashford, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir William Fogge, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Septvans, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Alice Kurriel circa 1439, nel Repton, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1485. Morì nel 1490, nel Kent, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Ashford, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Foggeが1417年にイギリスケントアシュフォードで生まれた時，父Sir William Foggeは28歳，母Septvansは28歳であった。約1439年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアレプトンでAlice Kurrielと結婚した。彼は1485年に兵役登録をした。彼は1490年にイギリスケントで73歳で死去し，イギリスケントアシュフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Fogge(이)가 1417년 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Fogge(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Septvans(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1439년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 레프턴에서 Alice Kurriel(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1485년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1490년 영국 켄트에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에 묻혔다.

Walmer, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Fogge nasceu em 1417, em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Fogge, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Septvans, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Kurriel aproximadamente 1439, em Repton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1485. Ele faleceu em 1490, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fogge родился в 1417 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Fogge было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Septvans, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Kurriel около 1439 г. в местности рептон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. В 1485 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1490 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Fogge nació en 1417, en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Fogge, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Septvans, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Alice Kurriel aproximadamente 1439, en Repton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1485. Murió en 1490, en Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra.
